title: theme.set
description: Set the user's chosen theme mode. The implementation persists the choice (localStorage in the desktop prototype; settings store in a future backend), applies it to the document root via the 'data-theme' attribute, and echoes the new mode plus the freshly resolved effective theme.

mode.description: The mode now in effect; equals the request 'mode' on success.

resolved.description: Effective theme after applying the new mode and (if 'system') resolving against the OS preference.

errors.message: The supplied 'mode' value is not one of 'system', 'light', or 'dark'.
